---
title: "RNA_PCA"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE,warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)
```


```{r Setting_Up_Enviroment, include=FALSE,warning=FALSE}

####Library Loading####
library("edgeR")
library("ggplot2")
library("tibble")
library("dplyr")
library("ggrepel")
library("readr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("pheatmap")
library("Cormotif")
library("tidyverse")
library("workflowr")
library("RUVSeq")
library("SummarizedExperiment")
library("readxl")
library("ggfortify")
library("ComplexHeatmap")

# BiocManager::install("SummarizedExperiment")


#Loading objects used in this workbook
RNA_Metadata <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_Metatdata_No4.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_No5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_Metatdata_No5.RDS")

RNA_Metadata_No4_NoRep <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata_No4.RDS")
RNA_Metadata_No5_NoRep <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/RNA_Metadata_No5.RDS")

ann_colors <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/concat/ann_colors.RDS")
ann_colors_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/ann_colors_No4.RDS")
ann_colors_No5 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/ann_colors_No5.RDS")

RNA_log2cpm <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_log2cpm.RDS")
RNA_log2cpm_No4 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_log2cpm_No4.RDS")
RNA_log2cpm_No5 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/RNA_log2cpm_No5.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_No4.RDS")
Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_NoD5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_No5.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No4.RDS")
Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No5 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No5.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No4 <- readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No4.RDS")
Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No5 <-readRDS("data/QC/concat/Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No5.RDS")


```

####Unfiltered

```{r RNA_Unfiltered_PCA_PC1_PC2, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}
prcomp_RNA <- prcomp(t(RNA_log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_RNA_meta <- prcomp_RNA$x %>% cbind(., RNA_Metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_RNA_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_RNA_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_RNA,
                  data = prcomp_RNA_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = RNA_Metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Unfiltered RNA-Seq Log2CPM")

```

####lcpm_G1_SpTp
#####All
```{r RNA_lcpm_G1_HalfSpeciesTimepoint_PCA, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm
metadata <- RNA_Metadata

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

```

#####No4
```{r RNA_lcpm_G1_HalfSpeciesTimepoint_PCA_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No4
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No4

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D5 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D5 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D5 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

```

#####No5
```{r RNA_lcpm_G1_HalfSpeciesTimepoint_PCA_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_logcpm_G1_SpTp_RNA_log2cpm_No5
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No5

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D4 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D4 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM (D4 CMeso) 
l0g2cpm >1 in 3 or more SpTp")
```
####FilterByExp
#####All

```{r RNA_FilterByExpression_PCA, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm
metadata <- RNA_Metadata

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression")

```
#####No4
```{r RNA_FilterByExpression_PCA_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No4
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No4

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 5 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 5 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 5 CMeso")

```


#####No5
```{r RNA_FilterByExpression_PCA_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_FilterByExpression_RNA_log2cpm_No5
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No5

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 4 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 4 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
EdgeR FilterByExpression - Day 4 CMeso")


```
####RMG0
#####All

```{r RNA_RowMean_G0_PCA, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm
metadata <- RNA_Metadata

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0")

```

#####No4
```{r RNA_RowMean_G0_PCA_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_No4
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No4

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 5 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 5 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 5 CMeso")

```


#####No5
```{r RNA_RowMean_G0_PCA_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

log2cpm <- Filt_RMG0_RNA_log2cpm_NoD5
metadata <- RNA_Metadata_No5

log2cpm <-data.frame(log2cpm)
prcomp_log2cpm <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_log2cpm_meta <- prcomp_log2cpm$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint <- factor(prcomp_log2cpm_meta$Timepoint, levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=1,
                  y=2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC1 v. PC2
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 4 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=2,
                  y=3) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC2 v. PC3
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 4 CMeso")

ggplot2::autoplot(prcomp_log2cpm ,
                  data = prcomp_log2cpm_meta,
                  colour = "Timepoint",
                  shape = "Species",
                  size = 4,
                  x=3,
                  y=4) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$timepoint_cor)+
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(label = metadata$Individual,
                            vjust = -0.5,
                            max.overlaps = 50)+
  ggtitle("PC3 v. PC4
Filtered RNA-Seq Log2CPM 
RMG0 - Day 4 CMeso")


```



```{r Updating Website, eval = FALSE}

# git -> commit all changes
# git -> push
wflow_publish("analysis/RNA_PCA_Ensemble.Rmd")

```
